Reviews Contact

Onyx Pest Control: Tampa Bay's Trusted Exterminators

Locally owned pest solutions since 2012. Serving Tampa Bay homes with same-day emergency service available for active infestations.

★★★★★ 6+ Verified Reviews
Request an Estimate → Meet the Team →
What We Do

Our Services

Professional pest control solutions tailored to your needs.

Termite Control

Advanced protection for Tampa's older homes against destructive subterranean and drywood termites.

Learn More →

Rodent Exclusion

Complete rat and mouse proofing for Tampa Bay area homes.

Learn More →

Mosquito Misting

Outdoor protection from disease-carrying mosquitoes in Tampa's humid climate.

Learn More →

Bed Bug Treatment

Discreet and thorough elimination for Tampa hotels and residences.

Learn More →

Palmetto Bug Control

Solutions for Florida's notorious giant roaches in Tampa homes.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality pest control services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees
Get Pre-Approved →

Warranty Protected

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Saved our 1936 bungalow in Seminole Heights from extensive termite damage. James found active mud tubes behind original baseboards that 2 other companies missed. Their borate treatment preserved the heart pine floors we just refinished.

Marta R.
★★★★★

After Hurricane Idalia, rats were getting into our South Tampa garage through the old laundry chute. Onyx sealed every possible entry with materials that blend perfectly with our historic home's exterior. No more midnight scratching noises!

Darrell W.
★★★★★

The misting system around our pool cage has been life-changing. Our kids can finally play outside in the evenings without being eaten alive. Technician adjusted the nozzles to account for our canal location - much fewer mosquitoes this rainy season.

Sophia K.
★★★★★

Discovered bed bugs after a cruise from Port Tampa Bay. Onyx's heat treatment eradicated them in one day without having to throw out our mattress. Appreciated their discreet service - our downtown condo neighbors never knew.

Carlos M.
★★★★★

Living near Bayshore meant constant palmetto bugs in our kitchen. The quarterly treatments have reduced sightings by 90%. They even found nests in our outdoor shower we didn't know about. Worth every penny for peace of mind.

Lisa T.
★★★★★

As a property manager for several old homes in Ybor City, I trust Onyx for all our pest control. They understand the unique challenges of historic buildings and work around our tight tenant schedules. Their 10-year warranty gives owners real protection.

Greg B.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Onyx Pest Control

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How often should Tampa homes be inspected for termites?
Annually for most properties, but every 6 months for older homes near water or with previous infestations. Summer humidity accelerates colony growth.
Will treatment disrupt my daily routine?
Most treatments take 2-3 hours with minimal movement of furniture. We avoid disrupting original hardwood floors in historic homes.
Are your chemicals safe for pets?
We use pet-friendly products that dry within 2 hours. For homes with birds or reptiles, we offer completely organic alternatives.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Onyx Pest Control.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
